Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 
61 
HYPERL 
LABEL: 
Hyperlipidemia End Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
hyperlipidemia as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: HYPERL 
LONG NAME: HYPERL 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria or have
